positive: A mystical forest silhouette scene capturing the essence of twilight. The composition is highly symmetrical, featuring a central, stylized group of ancient, gnarled trees with sweeping, elegant branches. The trees are depicted as deep navy blue and teal silhouettes against a vibrant, luminous backdrop of swirling celestial nebula in shades of lavender, gold, and magenta. Magical glowing elements, such as bioluminescent spores and floating crescent moons, drift through the branches. The style is a combination of detailed linework engraving and maximalist psychedelic abstract watercolor washes, ensuring high contrast and solid color blocking suitable for apparel printing. Cinematic, ethereal, high detail, vector illustration.
negative: blur, grainy, artifact, text, watermark, logo, trademark, low contrast, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, jpeg artifacts, sloppy, poorly drawn, ugly
